gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 18.1.5, DRM 3.57, 6.8.8-1-default)
notes: With the official patch (1.03) the Launcher starts (with glitched fonts). After clicking on "Launch" the intro video plays and ends in a black screen. With the community patch not even the video plays. Clickin "Launch" just closes the Launcher.
